info.title: Hiflow API
info.description: Hiflow allows you to manage your projects, encode your services, create your invoices and analyse your activity online.

post.description: Authenticate user with credentials and obtain bearer token
Generate a new JWT token for authenticated session

get.description: Retrieve list of customers with optional search and filtering
Retrieve detailed information about a specific customer
Retrieve list of estimates with pagination and filtering
Retrieve list of invoices with pagination and filtering
Retrieve list of jobs/projects with pagination and filtering
Retrieve list of tasks with pagination and filtering
Retrieve list of timesheet entries with filtering
Retrieve dashboard activity metrics and timeline
